home_description: A full-stack monorepo powered by TanStack Start, Elysia, and Effect — with end-to-end type safety.
home_feature_routing_description: File-based routing with TanStack Router — fully typed params, search, and loaders.
home_feature_api_description: Elysia + Eden Treaty gives you typed API calls from frontend to backend — zero codegen.
home_feature_ui_description: shadcn/ui components with Tailwind CSS v4 — dark mode, responsive, and accessible.
home_feature_i18n_description: Paraglide JS with compile-time translations — zero runtime overhead, fully typed messages.
about_description: A modern full-stack monorepo template designed for developer experience and type safety.
about_philosophy_description: This template prioritizes type safety across the entire stack — from database to UI. Every API call is typed, every route is validated, and every component follows consistent patterns.
about_principles_correctness_description: TypeScript strict mode, Zod validation, and Effect for error handling ensure reliability.
about_principles_dx_description: Hot reload, file-based routing, and end-to-end types mean less boilerplate, faster iteration.
about_principles_performance_description: SSR with streaming, optimistic updates, and smart caching via TanStack Query.
